zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Bracebridge於1208年出生在英國瓦維其可爾金斯波利時，他的父親William Bracebridge Baron Bracebridge of Tamworth30歲，母親Baroness Amice de Arden23歲。他和Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1277年1月12日在英國瓦維其可爾享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Bracebridge was born in 1208, in Kingsbury, Warwickshire, England, his father, William Bracebridge Baron Bracebridge of Tamworth, was 30 and his mother, Baroness Amice de Arden, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire. He died on 12 January 1277, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 69.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1277, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bracebridgeが1208年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアキングスブリーで生まれた時，父William Bracebridge Baron Bracebridge of Tamworthは30歳，母Baroness Amice de Ardenは23歳であった。彼はLady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshireとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1277年1月12日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Bracebridge(이)가 1208년 영국 워윅실르 킨그스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bracebridge Baron Bracebridge of Tamworth(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Amice de Arden(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 1월 12일 영국 워윅실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Bracebridge родился в 1208 г. в местности кингсбури, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bracebridge Baron Bracebridge of Tamworth было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Amice de Arden, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Lady Eva Bisege - Lady of Warwickshire. Он умер 12 января 1277 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.
